example_tasks: Draft the top 20 list of target clients
Prepare invoice for the 20th of the month
Review the v20 software release notes
Set up 20-minute timer for focus session
Audit the top 20 performing blog posts
Plan agenda for the 20th anniversary event
Collect 20 feedback responses for the survey
reasoning: The icon features the number '20' inside a circle with an overlapping smaller circle. While it could represent a 20-minute timebox, a top 20 list, or a deadline on the 20th, the specific number makes it too niche and ambiguous for general task categorization, leading to low consistency in user interpretation.
